texto: When a person has swum, traveled, run a lathe, planted flowers, ridden a motorcycle, made wine, painted a picture, parachuted, he has increased the fund from which he may draw for new figural developments. In other words, as the background of his experience becomes more diversified, it also becomes potentially more harmonious with a whole range of happenings.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Erving Polster sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “When a person has swum, traveled, run a lathe, planted flowers, ridden a motorcycle, made wine, p…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, experience, harmony, útil em momentos de viagem e harmony.

texto: Theory and knowledge remain suspect, not because of inherent worthlessness, but because of their historic isolation from action. Without theoretical orientation, however, action is vulnerable to oversimplified and glib imitativeness-even mimicry-and to the use of the gimmick.
explicacao: Citação de Erving Polster sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Theory and knowledge remain suspect, not because of inherent worthlessness, but because of their …” articula sabedoria, action, knowledge em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como knowledge e theory.

texto: A new question for the psychotherapist to ask is whether a theory can go beyond mere effectiveness in achieving either a so-called cure or even personal growth into its implications for the nature of an evolving society.
explicacao: Citação de Erving Polster sobre temas ligados a sucesso. “A new question for the psychotherapist to ask is whether a theory can go beyond mere effectivenes…” articula sucesso, society, therapy em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como therapy.

texto: We want to hear the story first and let the meaning unfold, rather than to be present with expectations of a certain significance into which all behavior is then fitted.
explicacao: Citação de Erving Polster sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We want to hear the story first and let the meaning unfold, rather than to be present with expect…” articula reflexao, expectations, experience em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como experience e meaning.
